message:
feat: comprehensive docs semantic lint suite (SEM-12.2)

Add 21-test lint suite validating cross-document semantic consistency:
- FOS rule-ID annotation completeness (all 45 mapped rules present)
- Rule-ID number↔name consistency against canonical registry
- Normative classification marker validation ([Explanatory]/[Implementation])
- Glossary term cross-reference checks (FOS ↔ glossary ↔ schema)
- Orphan rule-ID detection (no references outside canonical set)
- Internal cross-reference validation (§N.N links)
- Structural completeness (all 10 top-level sections, version tag)
- CancelKind/Outcome variant counts
- Formal definition presence for invariants, progress properties, laws

Combined with existing suites: 46 semantic tests total
(21 docs_lint + 10 rule_mapping_lint + 15 golden_fixture_validation)

Bead: asupersync-3cddg.12.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
